---
title: "Municipal Overview"
---

```{r}
#| include: false
source("../params.R")
ghg_emissions <- read_csv("../ghg_emissions.csv")
municipal_emissions <- ghg_emissions %>% filter(entity == "municipal")
```

```{r}
#| include: false
baseline <- municipal_emissions %>% filter(input_year == 2016) %>% select(total_mtco2e) %>% pull() %>% sum()
current <- municipal_emissions %>% filter(input_year == current_year) %>% select(total_mtco2e) %>% pull() %>% sum()
```

The Town of Amherst Municipality was responsible for `r round(baseline, 1)` Metric Tons of Co2 Equivalent emissions in FY 2016. In FY `r current_year`, this number was `r round(current,1)`. 


```{r}
#| echo: false
municipal_emissions %>%
  ggplot(aes(input_year, total_mtco2e)) +
  geom_col(aes(fill = supercategory)) +
  labs(x = "Year", y = "Total CO2e (metric tons)", title = "Municipal Emissions by Year") +
  scale_fill_amherst()
```
